display.purpose: Page title in the red header only.

body.purpose: Dense row content, helper text, forms, and metadata.

label.purpose: Table headers, field labels, compact state labels.

shadows.name: header
shadows.purpose: Separate red app header from workspace.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: DBS Red primary action button for app-changing actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{height:30px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #991B1B;background:#B91C1C;color:#fff;padding:0 16px;font:900 11px Inter, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.40);transition:background .15s ease,transform .15s ease}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:#991B1B;transform:translateY(-1px)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #DC2626;outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: White secondary control with DBS Red text and soft pink border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary{height:26px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #F2B8C6;background:#fff;color:#B91C1C;padding:0 10px;font:900 11px Inter, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.15);transition:background .15s ease,border-color .15s ease}.ds-btn-secondary:hover{background:#FFF1F4;border-color:#FFD4DF}.ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #DC2626;outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Compact white field for dense operational forms and filters.
components.css: .ds-input{height:26px;border:1px solid #D7D7DC;border-radius:5px;background:#fff;color:#111;padding:4px 8px;font:750 11px Inter, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif;outline:none}.ds-input:focus{border:2px solid #B91C1C}.ds-input::placeholder{color:#71717A}

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: White inner work card inside a grey operational frame.
components.html:
▦ Project Summary

Dense operational content lives here.
components.css: .ds-panel-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #E5E7EB;border-radius:7px;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.24);padding:12px;color:#171717;font:750 11px Inter, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif}.ds-panel-title{font-weight:900;color:#111;margin-bottom:8px}.ds-panel-card p{margin:0;color:#6B7280;line-height:1.4}

components.name: State Select
components.description: Strong red workflow-state control used in Dashboard rows.
components.css: .ds-state-select{min-height:24px;border:1px solid rgba(45,61,52,.35);border-radius:7px;background:#B91C1C;color:#fff;font:900 10px Inter, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 8px;line-height:1.05;text-align:center}.ds-state-select:hover{background:#991B1B}.ds-state-select:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #DC2626;outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Dock Navigation Button
components.description: Black-chrome floating navigation control with red active affordance.
components.css: .ds-dock-btn{width:38px;height:38px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;font:900 14px Inter, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif;transition:transform .18s ease,background .18s ease,border-color .18s ease}.ds-dock-btn:hover,.ds-dock-btn.is-active{transform:translateY(-5px);background:#231112;border-color:#DC2626}.ds-dock-btn:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #DC2626;outline-offset:2px}

narrative.overview: Project Tracker DBS uses a compact, modern operations-desk system: dense controls, strong hierarchy, banking-red emphasis, and black chrome navigation framing a white work surface. The UI should feel like a serious productivity app that stays out of the operator's way while keeping project state, dates, links, and risky actions visible.
keyCharacteristics: Compact information density with readable 10–12px operational typography.
DBS Red used for primary actions, active states, and state controls only.
Black Chrome reserved for global navigation, dock chrome, and strong command buttons.
White workspace surfaces nested inside Panel Grey operational frames.
Fast 150–180ms interaction feedback; no ornamental choreography.

rules.name: The Red Means Action Rule
rules.body: DBS Red is for action, selection, and state. Do not use it as decorative wash or section flavor.

rules.name: The Chrome Frames Work Rule
rules.body: Black Chrome belongs to app chrome and command moments, not normal content cards.

rules.name: The Weight Carries Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Use 750–900 weight before increasing type size. Large typography belongs only to page title and key metrics.

rules.name: The Product Font Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce decorative display fonts into labels, buttons, tables, or form controls.

rules.name: The Layer Before Lift Rule
rules.body: Use background, border, and spacing first. Add shadow only when a surface must visually separate from a neighboring layer.

dos: Do use DBS Red for primary actions, current state, selected rows, and state controls.
Do preserve compact 10–12px operational typography with high font weight for readability.
Do keep tables and lists visibly structured; this app manages CR operations, not marketing content.
Do use visible focus rings and keep WCAG AA contrast for text, placeholders, and disabled states.
Do keep animations short (150–180ms) and tied to state feedback.
Do use native/product-standard controls where possible; predictability beats novelty.
donts: Don't use decorative SaaS dashboards, playful gradients, neon/terminal novelty, generic AI-generated card grids, marketing-page drama, or raw prototype roughness.
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism, hero-metric templates, or identical decorative card grids.
Don't introduce new palette hues unless a real semantic state needs them.
Don't make inactive states full-saturation red.
Don't use modals as the first solution when inline editing or progressive disclosure already works.
Don't weaken density by inflating spacing or typography beyond what the workflow needs.
